productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Argentina AFA H REP Blue Jersey
description: Composition Blue and white striped Argentina replica jersey made of 100% climalite polyester interlock fabric, has a round neck with short sleeves, patented adidas 3-Stripes across the sleeves, Argentine football Association badge on left chest and adidas brandmark below the necklineFitting RegularWash care Wash dark colours separatelyWash below 30 degreesDo not soakDo not tumble dryDo not bleachDry in shadeCool ironAn authentic replica of the shirt that your Albicelestes wear when they're defending el Monumental, this Adidas Argentina home Replica Jersey is made from an easy-to-move-in polyester interlock and features allover CLIMALITE sweat protection and the team's crest above the heart. Be it Messi kicking the ball or the fans cheering him, you will enjoy the spirit of the 'blue and white stripes' on the field.
